title: Teardrop
meaning_summary: Teardrop remains one of Massive Attack's strongest long-tail earners because it works across streaming, sync, and mood-driven playlist listening.
revenue_drivers: Its association with film, TV, and prestige-drama culture keeps the song visible.
Trip-hop and downtempo playlists create steady catalog demand.
The track remains one of the most recognizable songs in the Massive Attack catalog.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from high replay value, sync utility, and durable streaming around a canonical trip-hop recording.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled masters and artist royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears materially tied to writer-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
